Within the family Orchidaceae, Scaphyglottis coriacea is classified as a genus of orchids, specifically within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae includes many epiphytic orchids, such as Scaphyglottis coriacea, which are characterized by their ability to grow on other plants.
